lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਪ ਨ ਤਾਪ ਨ ਕਰਮ ਕੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaap na taap na karam keet |
lines.english: I have not practiced meditation, austerities or good actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਕਰਿ ਗਤਿ ਮੇਰੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਇਆਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: too kar gat meree prabh deaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Save me, O my Merciful Lord God. ||1||Pause||
Within my mind, I have placed my hopes in the One Lord alone.
You are the Expert, O God, in all powers.
I do not know the way to meet You.
The Support of Your Name shall carry me across. ||2||
The fish cannot find the limits of the water.
You are Inaccessible and Unfathomable, the Highest of the High.
I am small, and You are so very Great. ||3||
Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of the Saints. ||4||7||
Those who attain You are rich.
Those who serve You are peaceful.
Those who meditate on You are wealthy.
Worship the One who gave you life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਤੂ ਸੇਵਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਤੂ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: tis too sev jin too keea |
lines.english: Serve the One who created You.
Basant, Fifth Mehl:
That mortal who is blessed with such great good fortune,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਕਰਿ ਪੋਤਦਾਰੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tis kee kar potadaaree fir dookh na laagai |1|
lines.english: Become His trustee, and you shall never again suffer sorrow. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਚਾਕਰੁ ਹੋਹਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਡਾਨੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: tis kaa chaakar hohi fir ddaan na laagai |
lines.english: Become His servant, and you shall never again be punished.
Life is wasted uselessly in the service of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਛੂ ਨ ਹੋਈ ਹੈ ਪੂਰਨ ਅਰਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: kachhoo na hoee hai pooran arathaa |
lines.english: No efforts shall be rewarded, and no works brought to fruition.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪਾਏ ਇਹੁ ਪਦੁ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: so paae ihu pad nirabaanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: attains this state of Nirvaanaa. ||1||Pause||
If you long for eternal peace, O Siblings of Destiny,
It is so painful to serve only mortal beings.
Service to the Holy brings lasting peace and bliss. ||2||
Among all essences, this is the essence of spiritual wisdom.
then join the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; this is the Guru's advice.
In the Saadh Sangat, you shall be emancipated. ||3||
There, the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is meditated on.
Meeting with the Guru, Nanak sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||4||8||
Among all meditations, meditation on the One Lord is the most sublime.
The Kirtan of the Lord's Praises is the ultimate melody.
Basant, Fifth Mehl:
Chanting His Name, one's mouth becomes pure.
Meditating in remembrance on Him, one's reputation becomes stainless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਅਰਾਧੇ ਜਮੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਨ ਕਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis araadhe jam kichh na kahai |
lines.english: Worshipping Him in adoration, one is not tortured by the Messenger of Death.
The Lord's Name - chant the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਲਹੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jis kee sevaa sabh kichh lahai |1|
lines.english: Serving Him, everything is obtained. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਹੈ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt jis kaa hai pragaas |
lines.english: His Light illuminates each and every heart.
He is the Support of the earth and the sky.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਆਗਹੁ ਮਨ ਕੇ ਸਗਲ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tiaagahu man ke sagal kaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Abandon all the desires of your mind. ||1||Pause||
Meditating in remembrance on Him, even fallen sinners are sanctified;
Among all religions, this is the ultimate religion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤ ਕਾਲਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਨ ਰੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ant kaal fir fir na roe |2|
lines.english: in the end, they will not weep and wail over and over again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਉ ਚਾਹਹਿ ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਦੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: jis kau chaaheh sur nar dev |
lines.english: The angels, mortals and divine beings long for Him.
To find Him, commit yourself to the service of the Society of the Saints. ||3||
Among all rituals and codes of conduct, this is above all.
One whom the Primal Lord God blesses with His bounties,
obtains the treasure of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tis kee gat mit kahee na jaae |
lines.english: His state and extent cannot be described.
My mind and body are gripped by thirst and desire.
Basant, Fifth Mehl:
Servant Nanak meditates on the Lord, Har, Har. ||4||9||
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, all my sins have been taken away.
I chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord; I am in love with the Name of the Lord. ||1||
The Merciful Guru has fulfilled my hopes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰੇ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਸੁਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal hiradai ur dhaare sadaa sadaa har jas sunaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I enshrine the Lord's Lotus Feet within my heart; I listen to the Lord's Praise, forever and ever. ||1||Pause||
By Guru's Grace, this spring of the soul has come.
